Quick Actions

HubSpot CRM

Connect your CRM to enrich job listings with company, deal, and contact data

Г°ВҹВ”ВҢ
CRM Provider
Select your CRM to enable the integration
1
Connect your HubSpot account

Go to HubSpot > Settings > Private Apps, create a Private App and copy the Access Token.

Token starts with pat-eu1- or pat-na1- ГўВҖВ” encrypted as a GitHub Secret.

2
Load CRM data

After sync completes (~2 min), data loads automatically on each page load. You can also load manually.

ГўВҡВҷГҜВёВҸ
Display Settings
Г°ВҹВҸВ·ГҜВёВҸ
Deal Stages

Loaded automatically from CRM data.

Load CRM data first to see deal stages.
Г°ВҹВҡВҖ

Apollo.io Enrichment

Enrich stakeholders with verified emails, phone numbers, LinkedIn URLs, and company intel

1
Connect Apollo.io

Go to Apollo > Settings > API Keys, create a key and paste it below.

Encrypted as a GitHub Secret ГўВҖВ” never visible in the browser.

API key is stored as a GitHub Secret
ГўВҡВҷГҜВёВҸ
Enrichment Settings
Г°ВҹВ“ВҲ
Sync Statistics
WhatsApp Integration
Send messages via wa.me deep links ГўВҖВ” no API key needed
ГўВ„В№ГҜВёВҸ
How it works

WhatsApp integration uses wa.me deep links to open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. When you click "Г°ВҹВ“Вұ WhatsApp" on a stakeholder card, it opens WhatsApp (desktop or mobile) with the selected template pre-loaded.

ГўВңВ… No API key
Works instantly with wa.me links
Г°ВҹВ“Вұ Any device
Opens WhatsApp Desktop or mobile
Г°ВҹВ“ВӢ Templates
Pre-filled from your WhatsApp templates
1
Phone numbers from Apollo

WhatsApp buttons appear automatically on stakeholder cards when a phone number is available. Phone numbers come from Apollo.io enrichment ГўВҖВ” configure your Apollo API key in the Apollo.io tab to start enriching contacts.

2
Customize templates

Edit your WhatsApp message templates in the Templates section. Templates support all the same variables as email/LinkedIn templates ({contact_name}, {company}, {role}, etc.).

3
Queue & send

You can either send directly (click the WhatsApp button) or queue messages for batch sending. Queued WhatsApp messages appear in the Queue view with a green "Г°ВҹВ“Вұ Send" button.

ГўВҡВЎ

Sync & Schedule

Manage data synchronization between your integrations and the dashboard

Г°ВҹВ”В„
Run Sync

Triggers the GitHub Actions workflow that syncs HubSpot CRM data and Apollo enrichment. Runs automatically every 2 hours.

Г°ВҹВ“ВӢ
How it works
1 GitHub Actions runs sync_hubspot.py to fetch CRM data → writes crm_data.json
2 If Apollo is configured, runs enrich_apollo.py → writes apollo_data.json
3 Dashboard auto-loads both JSON files on page load. Data merges into job cards and the side panel.

Г°ВҹВ‘ВӨ User Management

Г°ВҹВ”Вҗ
Google OAuth
Configure Google Sign-In to restrict dashboard access
Г°ВҹВ”В‘
Google OAuth Configuration
Control who can access this dashboard
From Google Cloud Console ГўВҶВ’ Credentials ГўВҶВ’ OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Restrict to @develeap.com domain.
Г°ВҹВ‘ВҘ
Team Members
0 users
ГўВңВүГҜВёВҸ
Invite New User
Send a dashboard invitation via email
Г°ВҹВ’ВЎ How access control works
When Google OAuth is configured with a Client ID, only users from the allowed domain can sign in. The user list below controls fine-grained roles: Admin can manage settings and users, Editor can modify templates and outreach, Viewer has read-only access to job listings. Without OAuth configured, the dashboard is open to anyone with the link.

Г°ВҹВӘВӘ Sender Profile

Your personal details used in outreach templates via {sender_*} variables

Г°ВҹВ“ВӢ Template Variables Preview

Г°ВҹВҺВӯ Delegation Management

Allow BDR users to send messages on behalf of other team members

Г°ВҹВҺВӯ
Active Delegations
0 delegations
ГўВһВ•
New Delegation
Select a BDR and choose who they can act as
Г°ВҹВ’ВЎ How delegation works
When a BDR user selects "Acting as" another user, all template {sender_*} variables resolve to the delegated user's profile. The recipient sees the message as if it came from that user. Queue entries track both Created by and Acting as for audit purposes. Only admins can manage delegations.
